mainEntity.name: How to optimize lawyer bios for AI visibility in Houston firms?
mainEntity.text: How to optimize lawyer bios for AI visibility in Houston firms?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use practice-specific content mirroring Chambers language, add schema markup, and link third-party recognitions to make bios AI-readable.

suggestedAnswer.text: Replace templates with differentiated stories echoing directories. Implement JSON-LD for profiles. Test in ChatGPT queries. Houston benefits from local angles. This builds patterns AI trusts, but tailor to avoid over-optimization flags from regulators.

name: Optimizing Houston Lawyer Bios for AI
description: Use practice-specific content mirroring Chambers language, add schema markup, and link third-party recognitions to make bios AI-readable.
